query:
CREATE TABLE `sso_tokens` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`token` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`usedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `sso_tokens_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `sso_tokens_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute CREATE TABLE `sso_tokens` (

	`token` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`usedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `sso_tokens_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `sso_tokens_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);
